title: Newton's Second Law
description: Defines the relationship between force, mass, and acceleration.

title: Gravitational Potential Energy
description: Energy due to position in a gravitational field.

title: Hooke's Law
description: Restoring force of a spring proportional to displacement.

title: Snell's Law
description: Describes refraction of light between media.

title: Boyle's Law
description: Pressure inversely proportional to volume at constant temperature.

title: Faraday's Law of Induction
description: Induced voltage proportional to rate of change of magnetic flux.

title: Archimedes' Principle
description: Buoyant force equals the weight of displaced fluid.

title: Bernoulli's Equation
formula: P + 1/2 * ρ * v^2 + ρ * g * h = constant
description: Conservation of energy for flowing fluids.

title: Heisenberg Uncertainty Principle
description: Limits precision of simultaneous position and momentum measurements.

title: Law of Conservation of Energy
description: Energy cannot be created or destroyed, only transformed.

title: Lorentz Force
description: Force on a charged particle in electric and magnetic fields.

title: Lenz's Law
description: Induced current direction opposes change in magnetic flux.

title: Pascal's Law
description: Pressure change transmitted undiminished in fluid.

title: Thermal Expansion
description: Change in length proportional to temperature change.

title: Wave Equation
description: Relationship between wave speed, frequency, and wavelength.

title: Doppler Effect
description: Observed frequency changes when source or observer moves.

title: Simple Harmonic Motion
description: Periodic motion with restoring force proportional to displacement.
